title: MC:FR Dungeons
description: Minecraft faithfully remastered with additional structures and biomes
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/339a8a783cd275d5b705240fb78b7e260e38f39e.png)**This modpack is based on the [Minecraft Faithfully Remastered](https://modrinth.com/modpack/minecraft-faithfully-remastered) modpack. In addtion to its content it adds new structures, biomes and mob variants using only Vanilla blocks and entities.**

**Install [this](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sever-pack-for-mcfr-dungeons) pack on your server if you want play it on a proper Server.**

**You also can use the included Essential Mod to open your world to friends.**

---

## Features:

- **Readds Mob Vote Losers**

- **Adds new biomes and remasteres Vanilla biomes**
- **Adds new structures and remasteres Vanilla structures**

- **Improved Rendering**
- **Improved Performance**

- **Improved Sounds**

- **Improved Entity/Player Models**
- **Improved Entity/Player Animations**
- **Mob Texture Variants**

- **Improved Leaves and Plants**
- **Improved Block Models**
- **Block Variants** 
  
- **Improved Items** 
- **Improved Particles** 

- **Improved Menus, HUD, Tooltips and Containers**

- **Full Controller Support**
- **Improved Multiplayer Experience**

---

<details>
<summary>Optimization</summary>

**Set your Memory to at least 2048MB**
  - _In instance settings -> Java and Memory -> Custom memory allocation -> **2048MB**_

**Disable these mods for better performance:**

- **Iris** Mod; this disables shaders
- **Shaders** can be substituted by enabeling **Sodium Core Shader Support** and **re-Shade**. This enables enhanced Shading without any FPS loss.
- **SubtleEffects** Mod; this disables the extra particle effects

</details>


<details>
<summary>Keybinds</summary>

![Keybinds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8be14a3afc7b36b7048a7e0fa4dd8c7df58bd331.png)

</details>
